title: Hierarchy Navigation
description: Navigation through the cluster hierarchy using d-pad: up/down to go up or down the hierarchy, left/right to go clockwise/anticlockwise around the selected knot. This provides intuitive gamepad-friendly route manipulation.
definition-of-done: D-pad navigation through hierarchy levels. Up/down moves between hierarchy levels. Left/right cycles through knot members. Visual feedback for current selection.
testing-plan: Verify d-pad up/down changes hierarchy level. Test left/right cycles within knot. Verify visual selection feedback.
